title: ORDER BY DESC + LIMIT incorrectly yields empty result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE sensors (id INT PRIMARY KEY, timestamp TIMESTAMP, value FLOAT NOT NULL);
SELECT id, value FROM sensors WHERE timestamp < '2023-01-01 09:00:00' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT id, value FROM sensors WHERE timestamp BETWEEN '2023-01-01 10:10:00' AND '2023-01-01 10:15:00' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY DESC with LIMIT on empty result set
